name: South Broadway Country Club
address: 17 Old Town Square Suite 135, Fort Collins, CO 80524
about: South Broadway Country Club is a premier indoor golf facility with multiple locations in Denver and Fort Collins, Colorado. Established in 2017, it was Colorado's first premier indoor golf facility, introducing Trackman golf simulators and a full-service cocktail bar to the local golfing community. The company operates three locations: South Broadway, Tennyson & Crow's Nest, and Fort Collins, each offering advanced golf simulator technology. The venues provide golf lessons from professional instructors, simulator rentals, and a full-service cocktail bar to help golfers improve their game rain or shine. They accept most major credit cards, cash, cryptocurrency, and precious metals on a case-by-case basis.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman simulator technology providing industry-leading accuracy and data
Full-service cocktail bar and premium beverage options available at all locations
Professional golf instruction available from certified instructors using TrackMan data
Upscale atmosphere with multiple locations, including the exclusive Crow's Nest at the Tennyson site

food_and_drink.notes: Full-service cocktail bar with curated craft beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Trackman 4 simulators with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT) technology

faq.question: Do I need clubs?
faq.answer: You can use your own clubs or rent clubs at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: The venue has a full-service kitchen and cocktail bar, but does not mention BYOB policies.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on your pace and the number of players in your bay, but typically ranges from 1.5 to 3 hours.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: South Broadway Country Club is designed for adult golfers and does not specifically advertise itself as kid-friendly.
